project.discardBody: The current project has unsaved changes. Discard them?
project.saveMissing: Saved, but some referenced audio files were missing on disk (skipped)
project.closeBody: Save changes to the current project before closing?
project.recoverBody: UTAI didn't close normally last time. Recover your unsaved work?

close.title: Close UTAI
close.body: Minimize to the tray, or quit UTAI?
close.busyIntro: These tasks are still running — quitting now will lose their progress:

tracks.empty: Drop audio files or add a new track
tracks.playOriginal: Play the original audio (sub-lanes leave the output)

training.title: Model Training
training.dataHint: Import clean vocal recordings. If separation/denoising is needed, process them on the track area first, export, then import here.
training.multiSpeakerHint: One singer by default. Click "+ Add singer" to add more — the trained model can then blend these voices by ratio in the cover node.
training.backendDiffDesc: SoVITS companion model · same name as the main model reuses its preprocessing caches · 44.1k
training.backendVocoderDesc: Fine-tune a singer's own NSF-HiFiGAN · better SoVITS diffusion/enhancer quality · shared by all their models
training.vocScopeValue: SoVITS (4.0/4.1) shallow diffusion & enhancer · 44.1kHz / hop 512 / 128 mel · RVC has no external vocoder interface
training.vocTotalStepsTip: Official guidance: ~2000 steps finish a small-dataset fine-tune
training.vocLicenseNote: Base model = the openvpi community vocoder 2024.02 (downloaded once by you; the missing-file error shows the URL); its weights are CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 and fine-tuned results inherit that license (non-commercial).
training.vocFixedNote: Fixed: 44.1kHz / hop 512 / 128 mel (the OpenVPI standard format) · f0 = parselmouth · fp32 training · base = community vocoder 2024.02
training.vocCropTip: Mel frames of the random training window: 32 = 16GB preset, 48 = 24GB preset
training.vocFreezeMpd: Freeze the MPD discriminator (official tip for short fine-tunes)
training.vocFreezeMpdTip: Freezes the multi-period discriminator, training only the generator and MSD — the official README suggests it may help short fine-tunes
training.nameExists: A model with this name already exists
training.fixedNote: Fixed: f0 = RMVPE · features = ContentVec · retrieval index = auto-built
training.sovitsFixedNote: Fixed: 44.1kHz · f0 = RMVPE · features = ContentVec · retrieval/cluster assets built at preprocessing
training.cacheAllData: Cache dataset in RAM (recommended for diffusion)
training.diffFixedNote: Fixed: 44.1kHz · mel = NSF-HiFiGAN recipe · features/pitch share the same-named main model's caches · keyshift augmentation on · loudnorm/volume embedding follow the main workspace
training.diffNoBase40: No public diffusion base model exists for 4.0 (vec256) — training starts from scratch; consider more total steps
training.diffNoModels: No SoVITS model installed yet — the shallow-diffusion companion attaches to an installed model; train or import the main model first
training.diffWorkspaceReuse: Same-named SoVITS training workspace found — its preprocessing caches will be reused (use the same dataset as the main model)
training.diffWorkspaceProgress: Same-named workspace already has {{steps}} diffusion steps — you can resume or retrain when starting
training.diffWorkspaceForeign: A same-named workspace belongs to another backend ({{family}}) — please pick a different model name
training.diffConfirmResumeBody: "{{name}}" already has {{steps}} trained diffusion steps. Resume continues from there; retrain clears ONLY the diffusion progress (main-model checkpoints and preprocessing caches are kept).
training.diffConfirmReuseBody: The preprocessing caches of workspace "{{name}}" will be reused (use the same dataset as the main model). Retrain = clear this workspace's diffusion progress and start over.
training.diffRetrainFullWipeNote: Note: this workspace has no main-model checkpoints — retraining wipes the ENTIRE workspace (preprocessing caches included).
training.retrainWipesDiff: Note: this workspace also holds shallow-diffusion training progress ({{steps}} steps) — retraining will wipe it too.
training.noAttachTarget: No installed SoVITS model to attach to (feature dims must match) — import the main model first, then attach here
training.volEmbedding: Volume embedding (inference loudness follows the input)
training.loudnorm: Loudness normalize (peak to 0dB — upstream default, lossy)
training.kmeansOpt: Train kmeans cluster centers instead of retrieval
training.allInMem: Keep dataset in RAM (speeds up small datasets)
training.saveWeights: Export a small model at each save
training.keepLatest: Keep only the latest big checkpoint (saves disk)
training.clearResultTip: Clears only the last run's results and curve shown on this page; the workspace and checkpoints are kept, resuming is unaffected
training.clearResultConfirmBody: Clear this page's training results and curve? Workspace and checkpoint files are kept and resuming is unaffected, but this list (with each checkpoint's audition/import/attach buttons) will no longer be shown, and the audition cache will be deleted.
training.auditionSpeakerTip: Which speaker of the multi-speaker model to audition; does not affect the kept checkpoints (a checkpoint always contains every speaker)
training.auditionNeedHost: Select an attach target model first
training.importSelectedBody: The selected checkpoints will be imported with these names (existing same-name models are replaced; use the per-row Import button to customize a name):
training.forceStopConfirmBody: Force termination does not save current progress (the last checkpoint is kept). Terminate?
training.augCopiesTip: Experimental: generates N PSOLA pitch-shifted copies (within ±3 semitones) per slice to expand the dataset (time-domain, formant-preserving — timbre is unchanged). A per-slice quality gate drops bad copies automatically (details in the workspace's aug_gate_report.json); augmented copies never enter the validation set or retrieval assets. Note: the dataset grows to about (1+N)×, so steps per epoch grow accordingly — budget training by total steps, not epochs. 0 = off
training.augFollowWorkspace: Copy count follows the main training's setting (not adjustable here)
training.diffPoolHint: Shallow diffusion shares one data pool with the main training: start without importing to use the main training's existing data, or import here to REPLACE the shared pool with new data (affects this and future diffusion runs only — the already-trained main model is unaffected)
training.errorHint: See train.log in the training workspace for details
training.versionMismatchBody: The training workspace of "{{name}}" is {{old}} but {{new}} is selected — resuming across versions is impossible. Retrain wipes the workspace and starts over as {{new}}.
training.modelVersionMismatchBody: A model named "{{name}}" ({{old}}) already exists and there is no resumable workspace. {{new}} is selected — training starts from scratch; importing under the same name afterwards replaces the existing model.
training.noWorkspaceBody: A model named "{{name}}" already exists but there is no resumable training workspace — training starts from scratch; importing under the same name afterwards replaces the existing model.
training.confirmExistBody: "{{name}}" already exists. Resume continues from the last checkpoint; Retrain wipes the workspace and starts over.
training.dropHint: Drop here to add as training data

workflow.title: Workflow Editor
workflow.depositFailed: Failed to deposit output to track
workflow.noOutputs: Run finished but produced no track output — check the Output node is connected to a rendered upstream
